mapper.select: SELECT id AS id, employer_id AS employerId, linked_account_id AS linkedAccountId, expected_amount AS expectedAmount, transferred_amount AS transferredAmount, mock_bank_transaction_id AS mockBankTransactionId, status AS status FROM funding_orders WHERE idempotency_key = #{idempotencyKey}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO funding_orders (employer_id, linked_account_id, expected_amount, idempotency_key, status) VALUES (#{employerId}, #{linkedAccountId}, #{expectedAmount}, #{idempotencyKey}, 'READY')
mapper.update: UPDATE funding_orders SET transferred_amount = #{transferredAmount}, mock_bank_transaction_id = #{bankTransactionId}, status = 'COMPLETED', completed_at = NOW(6), updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'READY'
